infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to find parking signs and live bay availability nearby.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use the camera so you can take a photo of a parking sign and we'll explain what it means.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pick a photo of a parking sign from your library so we can explain what it means.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera so you can capture parking signs.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to find parking near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos so you can pick a parking sign image.
